creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
First symptom is that the distfile is unfetchable (as named):

/usr/ports/editors/calligra
jmcooper@g7-HP$ sudo make
===>  Found saved configuration for calligra-2.4.2_1
=> calligra-2.5.0.tar.bz2 is not in /usr/ports/editors/calligra/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/editors/calligra/distinfo is out of date, or
=> calligra-2.5.0.tar.bz2 is spelled incorrectly.
*** [do-fetch] Error code 1

After running make makesum, I can fetch the distfile, but then the patches don't apply correctly:

jmcooper@g7-HP$ sudo make
===>  Found saved configuration for calligra-2.5.0_1
===>  Extracting for calligra-2.5.0_1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for KDE/calligra-2.5.0.tar.bz2.
===>   calligra-2.5.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.14.2 - found
===>  Patching for calligra-2.5.0_1
===>   calligra-2.5.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.14.2 - found
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for calligra-2.5.0_1
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to ./cmake/modules/FindWPD.cmake.rej
=> Patch patch-cmake__modules__FindWPD.cmake failed to apply cleanly.
*** [do-patch] Error code 1

Fix: 

1) Distfile can be fetched once the distinfo matches;

2) Patches are broken;
How-To-Repeat: 

1) Try to build or update editors/calligra;

2) Run make makesum trying to get the distfile;

3) Then patches fail to apply without error;
